title: Malformed/truncated LLM JSON hard-drops the capture (no salvage, no SST-gated degraded fallback)

routed.what: gemma4:26b emits truncated JSON ('Unterminated string') and 71-95s synthesis / >30s domain-extraction latency under LIGHT host load. Root cause of the TRUNCATION is model quality + output-token budget (max_tokens=2000 hardcoded in processor.py) + model routing — an ops/model-selection call, not code resilience. Recommend: raise/SST-own the output-token budget, and/or route domain-extraction+synthesis to a model with adequate output budget/latency.

notes: In-repo code-resilience part fixed: tolerant JSON extraction + SST-gated graceful degradation so a malformed/truncated response preserves the capture instead of hard-dropping it. The model-quality/latency root cause is routed to ops with evidence. Requires ml redeploy to take effect.
